industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Galata Wind Enerji A.S.
summary: Galata Wind Enerji A.S. operates wind and solar power plants. The company was formerly known as GY Enerji Danismanlik Poje M√É¬ºhendislik √É¬úretim, Ticaret ve Sanayi Limited Sirketi and changed its name to Galata Wind Enerji A.S. in January 2012. Galata Wind Enerji A.S. was founded in 2006 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. As of April 23, 2021, Galata Wind Enerji A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Dogan Enerji Yatirimlari Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
